steps.title: Identify the dual requirement in the claim
steps.content: The claim describes Odalie as eager to escape the monotony of her everyday life. A quotation that fully illustrates this must show both the monotony she experiences and her desire to break free from it.

steps.title: Match the claim to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly illustrates the claim: “life becomes a dull thing” names the monotony, and “one is ready for any new sensation” reveals her eagerness to escape it. The other three either contradict her eagerness, describe her surroundings without showing restlessness, or depict the carnival without illustrating the monotony she's escaping. That matches choice C — C is correct.
